Q20 Not checked
Technical • MECHANICAL ENGINEERING • +2 / -0.66
Not attempted

Surface imperfection which separates two orientations that are mirror image of one another is called

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Twin boundaries is a special type of grain boundary across which there is specific mirror lattice symmetry. Twin boundaries occurs in pairs such that the orientation change introduced by one boundary is restored by the other. The region between the pair of boundaries is called twinned region. Twinning occurs on a definite crystallographic plane and in a specific direction both of which depends on crystal structure.
